description: §7.6 — two file-level `${ }` blocks declaring DISTINCT names (`one`, `two`) share the file scope without collision; E-SCOPE-010 stays silent.
rationale: §7.6: distinct file-scope bindings across multiple `${ }` blocks are legal — the file scope is shared, not duplicated. E-SCOPE-010 fires only on a same-name re-declaration; distinct names must not fire.
